query:
select distinct on (p.id)
                  p.id,
                  p.caption,
                  p.taken_at,
                  p.exif_json,
                  p.storage_key,
                  t.storage_key as "thumbnail_key?"
             from photos p
             left join thumbnails t on t.photo_id = p.id
            where p.owner_id = $1
            order by p.id, t.size asc nulls last
            limit 10000
